queries.question: Which bank and branch issued CD Special?
queries.sql: SELECT Bank.BankName, Branch.BranchName FROM Branch JOIN BankingProducts ON BankingProducts.BranchName = Branch.BranchID JOIN Bank ON BankingProducts.BankName = Bank.BankName WHERE ProductName = 'CD Special'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?bankname ?branchname WHERE {
  ?branch a :Branches .
  ?bankingproducts a :BankingProducts .
  ?bankingproducts p:hasBranch ?branch .
  ?bank a :Banks .
  ?bankingproducts p:hasBank ?bank .
  ?bank p:BankName ?bankname .
  ?branch p:BranchName ?branchname .
  ?bankingproducts p:ProductName ?productname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?productname_f) = "CD Special")
}

queries.question: Which bank and their branches issue products where I can invest more than 50k?
queries.sql: SELECT Bank.BankName, Branch.BranchName FROM Branch JOIN BankingProducts ON BankingProducts.BranchName = Branch.BranchID JOIN Bank ON BankingProducts.BankName = Bank.BankName where MaximumDepositAmount > 49999
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?bankname ?branchname WHERE {
  ?branch a :Branches .
  ?bankingproducts a :BankingProducts .
  ?bankingproducts p:hasBranch ?branch .
  ?bank a :Banks .
  ?bankingproducts p:hasBank ?bank .
  ?bank p:BankName ?bankname .
  ?branch p:BranchName ?branchname .
  ?bankingproducts p:MaximumDepositAmount ?maximumdepositamount_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?maximumdepositamount_f) > 49999)
}
